name: KnitMate
subtitle: A steady knitting row tracker
description: KnitMate is a calm, local-first knitting companion built to help you avoid losing your current row. Track row counts, project notes, and recovery history per project without needing a server or account.
promotionalText: Track rows, save notes, and recover previous states without breaking your knitting flow.
reviewNotes: No login is required. The app stores project data only on-device and does not require a test account.
releaseNotes: Initial release with project-based row tracking, notes, local history, and restore support.
